mapper.select:
SELECT b.*, i.status AS invoice_join_status FROM eb_client_bill b LEFT JOIN eb_client_invoice i ON i.id = b.invoice_id
AND b.eid = #{eid} AND b.status = 1 AND b.entid = #{entid} AND b.types IN (0, 1)
AND (b.invoice_id < 1 OR i.status IN (-1, 2))
AND b.invoice_id = #{invoiceId} AND i.status IN (-1, 2)
ORDER BY b.date DESC, b.id DESC
